result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) function date_trunc(unknown, text) does not exist
LINE 1: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', createddate), 'FMMonth') ...
                       ^
HINT:  No function matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', createddate), 'FMMonth') AS month_name, date_trunc('month', createddate) AS month_start, count(*) AS cnt
FROM "Case"
WHERE regexp_replace(trim(both from orderitemid__c), '^#', '') IN ('802Wt0000078yuGIAQ','802Wt00000790mOIAQ','802Wt00000790zGIAQ','802Wt00000794F2IAI','802Wt000007968eIAA','802Wt00000796bfIAA','802Wt00000796qFIAQ','802Wt0000079734IAA','802Wt00000797W5IAI','802Wt00000797z7IAA','802Wt00000798YdIAI','802Wt00000798okIAA','802Wt0000079B0EIAU')
AND createddate >= '2020-06-10' AND createddate <= '2021-04-10'
GROUP BY month_start
ORDER BY month_start;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', createddate), 'FMMonth') AS month_name, date_trunc('month', createddate) AS month_start, count(*) AS cnt
FROM "Case"
WHERE regexp_replace(trim(both from orderitemid__c), '^#', '') IN ('802Wt0000078yuGIAQ','802Wt00000790mOIAQ','802Wt00000790zGIAQ','802Wt00000794F2IAI','802Wt000007968eIAA','802Wt00000796bfIAA','802Wt00000796qFIAQ','802Wt0000079734IAA','802Wt00000797W5IAI','802Wt00000797z7IAA','802Wt00000798YdIAI','802Wt00000798okIAA','802Wt0000079B0EIAU')
AND createddate >= '2020-06-10' AND createddate <= '2021-04-10'
GROUP BY month_start
ORDER BY month_start;

args.query: SELECT id, createddate, orderitemid__c FROM "Case" WHERE regexp_replace(trim(both from orderitemid__c), '^#', '') IN ('802Wt0000078yuGIAQ','802Wt00000790mOIAQ','802Wt00000790zGIAQ','802Wt00000794F2IAI','802Wt000007968eIAA','802Wt00000796bfIAA','802Wt00000796qFIAQ','802Wt0000079734IAA','802Wt00000797W5IAI','802Wt00000797z7IAA','802Wt00000798YdIAI','802Wt00000798okIAA','802Wt0000079B0EIAU') ORDER BY createddate LIMIT 100;

args.query:
SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', createddate::timestamptz), 'FMMonth') AS month_name, date_trunc('month', createddate::timestamptz) AS month_start, count(*) AS cnt
FROM "Case"
WHERE regexp_replace(trim(both from orderitemid__c), '^#', '') IN ('802Wt0000078yuGIAQ','802Wt00000790mOIAQ','802Wt00000790zGIAQ','802Wt00000794F2IAI','802Wt000007968eIAA','802Wt00000796bfIAA','802Wt00000796qFIAQ','802Wt0000079734IAA','802Wt00000797W5IAI','802Wt00000797z7IAA','802Wt00000798YdIAI','802Wt00000798okIAA','802Wt0000079B0EIAU')
AND createddate::timestamptz >= '2020-06-10' AND createddate::timestamptz <= '2021-04-10'
GROUP BY month_start
ORDER BY month_start;
